overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character with cybernetic legs and a red cowboy hat walking through a futuristic urban environment. The character traverses a wide sidewalk lined with palm trees, waits at a street intersection for traffic to pass, then crosses and continues along the opposite side featuring buildings with red neon accents.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide, sunlit sidewalk bordered by modern glass buildings and palm trees in concrete planters. The camera follows smoothly as the character passes a seated NPC on a bench and encounters another pedestrian walking the opposite way, approaching a street intersection in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a street corner and stops to wait for traffic. A traffic light pole stands prominently on the left while vehicles including a red sports car pass by on the road. The character looks around while waiting, with the crosswalk visible ahead and the modern glass building now visible across the street.

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at the crosswalk and continues along the opposite sidewalk. The environment features buildings with distinctive red neon accent lighting on the left. The character passes another pedestrian while walking toward a covered walkway entrance, with the camera following smoothly through the futuristic urban setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit futuristic city that shifts from a bright, open promenade to a street corner and finally toward a district accented with red neon. It begins by following the character along a wide sidewalk lined with palm trees and glass buildings, passing a seated NPC and an oncoming pedestrian. As the character reaches a street intersection, the camera slows to a halt, capturing passing vehicles and a red sports car while the character waits at a traffic light. The scene then shifts as the character crosses the street, moving away from the open sunlight toward a sidewalk featuring buildings with distinctive red neon lighting. Finally, the camera continues its smooth pursuit as the character passes another pedestrian and heads toward the entrance of a covered walkway.
